lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਕਤੀ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਫਿਰਿ ਜਨਮਿ ਬਿਨਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: sakatee kinai na paaeo fir janam binaasaa |
lines.english: Through the material universe of Shakti, no one has ever found the Lord; they continue to be born and die in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਵੈ ਤਰਫਾ ਉਪਾਈਓਨੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਸਕਤਿ ਸਿਵ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: dovai tarafaa upaaeeon vich sakat siv vaasaa |
lines.english: He created both sides; Shiva dwells within Shakti (the soul dwells within the material universe).

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਸਾਸਤ ਸੋਧਿ ਦੇਖੁ ਊਤਮ ਹਰਿ ਦਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: simrit saasat sodh dekh aootam har daasaa |
lines.english: Searching and looking through the Simritees and the Shaastras, I have found that the most sublime person is the slave of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਸਾਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਪਿ ਸਾਸ ਗਿਰਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur seviai saat paaeeai jap saas giraasaa |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, peace is found, meditating on the Lord with every breath and morsel of food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਵਾ ਪੰਡਿਤੁ ਜੋਤਕੀ ਵੇਦ ਪੜਾ ਮੁਖਿ ਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: hovaa panddit jotakee ved parraa mukh chaar |
lines.english: I might become a Pandit, a religious scholar, or an astrologer, and recite the four Vedas with my mouth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਕੋ ਥਿਰੁ ਨਹੀ ਨਾਮੇ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਸਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam binaa ko thir nahee naame bal jaasaa |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Naam, nothing is permanent and stable; I am a sacrifice to the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਸਚਾ ਅਖਰੁ ਭੁਲਿ ਜਾਇ ਚਉਕੈ ਭਿਟੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mat sachaa akhar bhul jaae chaukai bhittai na koe |
lines.english: let me not forget the Word of Truth, that no one can touch my sacred cooking square.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਮਧੇ ਪੂਜੀਆ ਅਪਣੈ ਚਜਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: nav khandd madhe poojeea apanai chaj veechaar |
lines.english: I might be worshipped throughout the nine regions of the earth for my wisdom and thought;

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਕਰੇ ਆਪਿ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap upaae kare aap aape nadar karee |
lines.english: He Himself creates and He Himself acts; He bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੂਠੇ ਚਉਕੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸਚਾ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jhootthe chauke naanakaa sachaa eko soe |1|
lines.english: Such cooking squares are false, O Nanak; only the One Lord is True. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਟਕੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਹੋਰੁ ਕੰਟਕੁ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: kanttak kaal ek hai hor kanttak na soojhai |
lines.english: Only death is painful; I cannot conceive of anything else as painful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਸੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape de vaddiaaeea kahu naanak sachaa soe |2|
lines.english: He Himself grants glorious greatness; says Nanak, He is the True Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਫਰਿਓ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਪਾਪੀ ਸਿਉ ਲੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: afario jag meh varatadaa paapee siau loojhai |
lines.english: It is unstoppable; it stalks and pervades the world, and fights with the sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਹਰਿ ਭੇਦੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabadee har bhedeeai har jap har boojhai |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one is immersed in the Lord. Meditating on the Lord, one comes to realize the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਜੋ ਮਨ ਸਿਉ ਜੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: so har saranaaee chhutteeai jo man siau joojhai |
lines.english: He alone is emancipated in the Sanctuary of the Lord, who struggles with his own mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਕਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਸੀਝੈ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: man veechaar har jap kare har daragah seejhai |11|
lines.english: One who contemplates and meditates on the Lord in his mind, succeeds in the Court of the Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਰਜਾਈ ਸਾਖਤੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਸਚੁ ਕਬੂਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: hukam rajaaee saakhatee daragah sach kabool |
lines.english: Submit to the Will of the Lord Commander; in His Court, only Truth is accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗਸੀ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਦੇਖਿ ਨ ਭੂਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: saahib lekhaa mangasee duneea dekh na bhool |
lines.english: Your Lord and Master shall call you to account; do not go astray on beholding the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਲ ਦਰਵਾਨੀ ਜੋ ਕਰੇ ਦਰਵੇਸੀ ਦਿਲੁ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: dil daravaanee jo kare daravesee dil raas |
lines.english: One who keeps watch over his heart, and keeps his heart pure, is a dervish, a saintly devotee.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸਕ ਮੁਹਬਤਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਲੇਖਾ ਕਰਤੇ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eisak muhabat naanakaa lekhaa karate paas |1|
lines.english: Love and affection, O Nanak, are in the accounts placed before the Creator. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੀਰੈ ਹੀਰਾ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੰਠਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: heerai heeraa bedhiaa naanak kantth subhaae |2|
lines.english: The diamond of his mind is pierced through with the Diamond of the Lord's Name; O Nanak, his neck is embellished with it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਲਗਉ ਜੋਇ ਮਧੂਕੜਉ ਸਾਰੰਗਪਾਣਿ ਸਬਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: algau joe madhookrrau saarangapaan sabaae |
lines.english: One who is unattached like the bumble bee, sees the Lord of the world everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਾਲੁ ਵਿਆਪਦਾ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh kaal viaapadaa mohi maaeaa laage |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are afflicted by death; they cling to Maya in emotional attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਛਾੜਸੀ ਭਾਇ ਦੂਜੈ ਠਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh maar pachhaarrasee bhaae doojai tthaage |
lines.english: In an instant, they are thrown to the ground and killed; in the love of duality, they are deluded.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਵੇਲਾ ਹਥਿ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਡੰਡੁ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: fir velaa hath na aavee jam kaa ddandd laage |
lines.english: This opportunity shall not come into their hands again; they are beaten by the Messenger of Death with his stick.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਜਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: tin jam ddandd na lagee jo har liv jaage |
lines.english: But Death's stick does not even strike those who remain awake and aware in the Love of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਤੁਧੁ ਛਡਾਵਣੀ ਸਭ ਤੁਧੈ ਲਾਗੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: sabh teree tudh chhaddaavanee sabh tudhai laage |12|
lines.english: All are Yours, and cling to You; only You can save them. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬੇ ਜੋਇ ਅਗਛਮੀ ਦੂਖੁ ਘਨੇਰੋ ਆਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: sarabe joe agachhamee dookh ghanero aath |
lines.english: See the imperishable Lord everywhere; attachment to wealth brings only great pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਲਰੁ ਲਾਦਸਿ ਸਰੁ ਲਾਘਣਉ ਲਾਭੁ ਨ ਪੂੰਜੀ ਸਾਥਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaalar laadas sar laaghnau laabh na poonjee saath |1|
lines.english: Loaded with dust, you have to cross over the world-ocean; you are not carrying the profit and capital of the Name with you. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂੰਜੀ ਸਾਚਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੂ ਅਖੁਟਉ ਦਰਬੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: poonjee saachau naam too akhuttau darab apaar |
lines.english: My capital is Your True Name, O Lord; this wealth is inexhaustible and infinite.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਖਰੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਉ ਧੰਨੁ ਸਾਹੁ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vakhar niramlau dhan saahu vaapaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, this merchandise is immaculate; blessed is the banker who trades in it. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਪਿਰਾਣਿ ਲੈ ਮੋਟਉ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਮਾਣਿ ॥
lines.translit: poorab preet piraan lai mottau tthaakur maan |
lines.english: Know and enjoy the primal, eternal Love of the Great Lord and Master.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਥੈ ਊਭੈ ਜਮੁ ਮਾਰਸੀ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲਣੁ ਨਾਮਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: maathai aoobhai jam maarasee naanak melan naam |3|
lines.english: Blessed with the Naam, O Nanak, you shall strike down the Messenger of Death, and push his face to the ground. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਪੇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਤਿਨ ਨਿਹਫਲ ਕਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: eik aape bharam bhulaaeian tin nihafal kaam |
lines.english: He confuses some in doubt; fruitless are their actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਵਾਰਿਓਨੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape pindd savaarion vich nav nidh naam |
lines.english: He Himself has embellished the body, and placed the nine treasures of the Naam within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikanee guramukh bujhiaa har aatam raam |
lines.english: Some, as Gurmukh, realize their Lord, the Supreme Soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਨੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਕੈ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਊਤਮ ਕਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikanee sun kai maniaa har aootam kaam |
lines.english: Some listen to the Lord, and obey Him; sublime and exalted are their actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਗਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: antar har rang upajiaa gaaeaa har gun naam |13|
lines.english: Love for the Lord wells up deep within, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord's Name. ||13||
